faq.question: What is the difference between troy and avoirdupois ounces?
faq.answer: A troy ounce is 31.1035 grams, used for precious metals. An avoirdupois ounce is 28.3495 grams, used for everyday weight. Troy ounces are about 10% heavier.

faq.question: Is the Precious Metal Weight Converter free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?

faq.question: What amount should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate amount value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.
